bio: Mohsen Mahdavi Kalateh served as a Deputy Minister within Iran's [Ministry of Intelligence](/orgs/ministry-of-intelligence) (MOIS). He was killed on 3 March 2026 in the continuing wave of targeted strikes on Iranian intelligence leadership that followed the [February 28, 2026 decapitation strike](/events/israeli-strikes-iran-feb-2026).
editorial_notes: Deputy Minister of Intelligence. Killed 3 March 2026.
